religions.name: Atheist
religions.dogma_vector_note: Near-zero dogma across all religious topics. Slight sensitivity on Minority Rights (0.2) reflecting secular rights awareness.
religions.authority_multiplier_note: No religious authority figure. Peer interactions carry equal weight.
religions.base_gullibility_note: Slightly higher openness to persuasion reflecting lower ideological rigidity on religious topics.

friction_matrix_note: 4x4 matrix indexed by religion id (0=Hindu, 1=Muslim, 2=Christian, 3=Atheist). Atheist row has the lowest friction with all groups — they are the least tribally reactive in religious disputes.
